creator: toor@nl.nisser.com
text:
wrong filemodes

nl:/usr/ports/news/inn# ls -l distinfo
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  58 Sep 24 14:29 distinfo*

Fix: 

nl:/usr/ports/news/inn# chmod a-x distinfo
nl:/usr/ports/news/inn# ls -l distinfo
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  58 Sep 24 14:29 distinfo
How-To-Repeat: 
look at port in question
